name: add_cup
description: Adds a cup object to the scene at the specified position. The cup is composed of a cylinder body and a capsule handle.
signature: add_cup(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict
source_code:
async def add_cup(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict:
    """Adds a cup object to the scene at the specified position."""
    # Cup body: cylinder (radius 0.03, half-height 0.04)
    # Handle: capsule (radius 0.005, half-length 0.015) attached to side
    cup_body_xml = """
        <geom type="cylinder" size="0.03 0.04" rgba="0.9 0.9 0.9 1" mass="0.1" condim="4" friction="1 0.5 0.01"/>
        <geom type="capsule" size="0.005 0.015" pos="0.035 0 0" euler="0 90 0" rgba="0.9 0.9 0.9 1" mass="0.01"/>
    """
    result = await add_custom_object("cup", x, y, z, body_xml=cup_body_xml)
    return result
